nodes.label: lib/db/schema.ts
nodes.summary: Defines PostgreSQL table schemas for chats and messages using Drizzle ORM pg-core, including JSONB columns for widget and tool invocations.

nodes.label: chats table
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table representing a chat session with id, title, and createdAt timestamp.

nodes.label: messages table
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL table storing chat messages with role, content, jsonb widget column, jsonb toolInvocations column, and cascade-delete FK to chats.

edges.note: Defines messages pgTable with FK reference to chats
chatId FK references chats.id with cascade delete
The jsonb 'widget' column stores serialized Widget objects whose shape is defined by types/widget.ts
